context.environment: Headquarters, Branch-1, Branch-2, and cloud application connected via encrypted tunnels.
symptoms: Users report high latency to the cloud application during business hours.

interpretationTips: Differentiate congestion from routing convergence behavior.
Correlate packet loss with RTT spikes.
commonMisconceptions: Assuming encryption overhead is always the cause of latency.
Interpreting a single traceroute as definitive proof of root cause.

artifacts.label: Ping from Branch-2 to Cloud Application
artifacts.explanation: ICMP RTT and packet loss from Branch-2 to cloud app.
interpretationTips: Observe whether latency increases correlate with packet loss.

artifacts.label: Branch-2 NetFlow Summary (Top Talkers)
artifacts.explanation: Top traffic flows observed at Branch-2 edge.
interpretationTips: Look for unusual traffic concentration by port or destination.
